text_block_list.name: Legendary Bard
text_block_list.text:
Alas, things are dire. I cannot help<n>striking awe in
the others, but it<n>prevents them from accepting my
Satsuki Sho challenge! May the<n>goddesses smile
upon me...

text_block_list.name: Legendary Bard
text_block_list.text:
Enter Admire Vega, a passionate fan<n>from my
year-end party! It seems she<n>is to run in the
Satsuki Sho as well.

text_block_list.name: Legendary Bard
text_block_list.text: The stage of destiny has been set!
